title: Syracuse Department of Public Works Receives Two APWA Awards
summary: Syracuse Department of Public Works received two APWA awards for its Waste & Recycling Revitalization Program, which modernized sanitation operations through new carts, optimized routes, and semi-automated collection. The initiative reduced sanitation worker shoulder injuries from 41% of all city injuries in 2022 to zero in 2025, while improving service reliability and neighborhood cleanliness.

political_signal.description: Mayor and DPW leadership champion worker safety and operational efficiency improvements; award recognition signals successful execution of departmental innovation agenda aligned with CIO's innovation mandate.
